allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data.json'\)\); print\('Top-level keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('meta keys:', list\(d.get\('meta', {}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\('Number of coaches:', len\(d.get\('coaches', []\)\)\); print\('Sample coach:', list\(d['coaches'][0].keys\(\)\) if d.get\('coaches'\) else 'N/A'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data.json'\)\); print\('byeSchedule' in d, 'squadNames' in d, 'originRounds' in d, 'originDefaults' in d\); print\('Players sample keys:', list\(next\(iter\(d.get\('players', {}\).values\(\)\)\).keys\(\)\)\)")
